notes: Runs now surface OpenCode session failures clearly instead of leaving work looking stuck, with failed runs shown in the board and run details.
Merge and rebase flows are more reliable: conflict pauses are detected from the real Git state, and Continue Rebase or Abort Rebase actions stay available when you need them.
Project and task creation flows land in the right place faster: new projects and new tasks take you back to the board, and project setup waits for run providers and models before showing defaults.
Default run model selection is more accurate when providers expose overlapping model names, keeping the chosen model tied to the selected provider.

The app shell is more polished: the desktop window opens maximized, long board card titles wrap better, the new-task action hides until a project is selected, and the quit warning counts active runs correctly.
Diff and editor interactions are smoother, with Python, Go, and PHP syntax highlighting plus more reliable tooltip, status-menu, and source-branch dropdown dismissal.

commands.deb: sudo apt update && sudo apt install --only-upgrade orkestraos
